name: property managers handling 10–20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in tenant communication. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using templates and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual reporting processes lead to delays in property inspections.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient manual reporting processes lead to delays in property inspections.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in tenant communication. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using templates and spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual report generation using templates and spreadsheets

one_liner: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in tenant communication. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using templates and spreadsheets.
